mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repositories WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND (repo_name = #{repoName} OR repo_url = #{repoUrl})
mapper.insert: { CALL PROC_INSERT_GIT_REPO( #{id, mode=IN}, #{projectId, mode=IN}, #{repoUrl, mode=IN}, #{localPath, mode=IN}, #{repoName, mode=IN}, #{repoType, mode=IN} ) }
mapper.update: MERGE INTO git_commit_logs g USING DUAL ON (g.commit_sha = #{commitSha} AND g.repo_id = #{repoId} AND NVL(g.task_id, 'NONE') = NVL(#{taskId}, 'NONE')) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (commit_sha, repo_id, task_id, message, author, commit_date) VALUES (#{commitSha}, #{repoId}, #{taskId}, #{message}, #{author}, #{commitDate})
mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, repo_url, local_path, repo_name, repo_type, create_date FROM repositories WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT g.commit_sha, g.repo_id, r.repo_name, g.task_id, g.message, g.author, TO_CHAR(g.commit_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS commit_date FROM git_commit_logs g LEFT OUTER JOIN repositories r ON g.repo_id = r.id WHERE g.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY g.commit_date DESC

SELECT r.id, r.repo_name, r.repo_url, r.local_path, r.project_id, r.repo_type, c.com_name AS repo_type_name, TO_CHAR(r.create_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS create_date, TO_CHAR(MAX(g.commit_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS last_sync_date, COUNT(g.commit_sha) AS total_commit_count FROM repositories r LEFT OUTER JOIN common_code c ON r.repo_type = c.com_value LEFT OUTER JOIN git_commit_logs g ON r.id = g.repo_id WHERE r.project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY r.id, r.repo_name, r.repo_url, r.local_path, r.project_id, r.repo_type, c.com_name, r.create_date ORDER BY r.repo_type DESC, r.create_date DESC
